name: workflow-review-change
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,quality-gates{tests,security},deterministic-output | lens: kahneman-tversky | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Project, folder, or module to review.

required_inputs.name: REVIEW_FOCUS
required_inputs.description: Optional emphasis for the combined review.

starter_inputs.label: 리뷰에서 특히 보고 싶은 것
starter_inputs.help: maintainability, risk, mixed 중 하나를 권장한다.
